title: Create: Crushing Quartz
description: This small addon for Create allows you to crush quartz into experience. The recipe themselves were taken from Create Stuff & Additions.
body:
## 📜 Description

  **This small addon for Create allows you to crush quartz into experience. The recipe themselves were taken from Create Stuff & Additions.**

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**
 
 - **Discord server:

- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**
   
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
